final:
// // This module implements a combinational logic circuit for a Flash memory cell that accepts a 1-bit input (D) and produces a 1-bit output (Q). The output Q should reflect the input D when a control signal (C) is low. When the control signal C is high, the output Q should retain its previous state (hold its value).
module flash_memory_cell (
    input wire D,
    input wire C,
    output wire Q
);
    reg Q_reg;

    always @(*) begin
        if (C) begin
            Q_reg = D;  // Update output Q with input D when control C is high
        end
    end

    assign Q = Q_reg;  // Continuous assignment to output Q
endmodule

The output Q should reflect the input D when a control signal (C) is low. When the control signal C is high, the output Q should retain its previous state (hold its value).
